note: Counts only, no task text. Escalation rate fell monotonically across three live runs as verifier coverage improved: 0.28 (25 tasks, M11/M12) -> 0.164 (110, M13) -> 0.0728 (261, M15). Both previously-found verifier false-positives stayed FIXED at scale: JSON tasks auto_was_wrong=0 (M12 fix) and numeric-TAGGED tasks auto_was_wrong=0 (M14 fix). M15's single auto_was_wrong is a TASK-METADATA gap (a reused string-exact speed-of-light row lacking numeric metadata routes to the strict exact_answer_match), not a verifier regression. M15 verifier_distribution includes numeric_tolerant_check (20) + explain_rubric_check (15), the M14 additions. auto_outcome is a CANDIDATE; production/final thresholds stay gold/audit gated.
